reviews.review_description: Great game but needs a few more dinos and a multiplayer mode
There's a glitch where you can get infinite dinosaurs and there's a glitch where you can ban people with nothing. It's very weird. Someone did it to me before I got banned for a week .
I thought it looked fun but only gives you three dinosaurs.

This is a great game, but it's missing one thing...sandbox mode. I would die for a sandbox mode in this game. I love the game and missions, along with how the game can also be educational. Can't wait to play some more with different dinos! I would love to see a sandbox mode in the future, though!!! The only complaint i have is weather destruction...its devastating to see all my plants die after the weather. I think it's a great idea, but maybe tune it down a bit. It always drains me to see that i have to redo all the plants after the weather. Like i said, i lice the weather aspect, but i personally think it should be tuned down a bit. Dinosaurs look amazing, and I love the growth cycle! There are no bugs so far, which is amazing for a game like this. Awesome game devs did an amazing job!😊

developer_response.body: Hi Mr.Peelz, we are so glad you are enjoying Dino Hab. Thank you for your feedback and review. We’ll be sure to pass on your feedback to the devs!!

reviews.review_description: Dino Hab excels at blending education with gameplay that is both deep enough for kids to grasp and engaging for adults, which is quite an achievement. It provides a solid understanding of how to create a thriving biome while ensuring that your dinosaurs have everything they need to flourish. The game introduces unexpected elements like environmental challenges and even the loss of your dinosaurs, adding layers of difficulty and emotional weight. This really highlights how Virtual Reality can enhance your connection to the creatures you care for in the game. Plus, the Mixed Reality mode lets you bring a baby or child dinosaur into your home, adding an extra touch of magic to the experience.

developer_response.body:
Hi TheVRRealm,
Thank you for your thoughtful review! We’re thrilled you enjoyed the depth, challenges, and magic of Dino Hab – especially bringing dinos into your home.

reviews.review_title: BABY DINOSAURS IN MY LIVING ROOM!
reviews.review_description: I pre-ordered this when it first came out and have only had an hour with it today, but what a blast.  The cutest baby dinosaurs, the most amazing EPIC SCALE when they grow up.  And that's just the Triceratops so far.  Titanosaur and T-Rex soon to come.  Can't wait for the weekend!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for sharing your Dino Hab journey! We’re thrilled you’re having a blast with your Triceratops. Can’t wait for you to experience the others—there’s so much more to discover. Enjoy your weekend adventures!

reviews.review_description:
I have never seen a game like this before. If you love dinosaurs and ever wondered what it would be like to be around them, this game is for you. Raise the dinosaurs and save their eco system. It's educational, but in a fun way where you will get to interact with them.
It's a must! Great for VR/MR newbies!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your thoughtful feedback! We’re glad you’re enjoying Dino Hab’s unique experience of bonding with dinosaurs and restoring ecosystems. It’s great to hear that the MR/VR elements are approachable for beginners while still being engaging.

reviews.review_description:
The dinosaurs are so cute, but I do wish that you could’ve let the player choose what dinosaur to start with and then choose if they wanna have a different dinosaur ￼
￼ but all besides that it’s a really great game 
￼

developer_response.body:
Hi abilenept,
Thanks for your kind words! We’re so glad you’re enjoying the game and your dinosaurs. We’ll pass along your suggestion to the team.

reviews.review_description: I love the Core mechanics and Atmosphere, and Dinosaurs are always right. However, I am distracted by the bluish skin effect, which tells me to pet them. The problem is that the effect is always on! I can't see those cute dinosaurs, only a blue silhouette. I am sure the devs will work hard to keep this game better and better, but please fix the blue skin effect or make it an option.

developer_response.body:
Hello vanz.kim,
We're glad you're enjoying Dino Hab! The Paleoguard has put an information overlay in your visor to help you identify when there are certain opportunities to unlock with your dinosaurs. If you see a blue overlay in your visor, this signals that the dinos need some attention and you can collect more points by petting them. A green overlay signals that they are ready to grow larger and when you pet them, they'll grow. The overlays will disappear after you have cared for them or helped them to grow. Thank you for your feedback. We've passed it along to the team.

reviews.review_title: Love the symbiosis and baby dinos
reviews.review_description: It's awesome to see a game that's both super fun (look at that cute baby dino!) and actually teaches you something. Love how the game combines environmental and social dynamics to create healthy symbiosis... something humans could benefit from today :)
School's out, half-day, i've been waiting to play this.  It's like being Dino Dana in my house.  Can't wait to come back for more tomorrow.

developer_response.body: Awesome! Sounds like you’re already a time traveler pro! Enjoy building your ecosystem, and we can’t wait to see what you’ll discover tomorrow.

reviews.review_description: I was blown away with this game in just how educational it was regarding plant life and the ecosystem of dinosaurs

developer_response.body: Thanks so much! Dino Hab is all about bonding with dinos and restoring harmony to prehistoric ecosystems. Glad you’re enjoying it!

reviews.review_description: Keep being stuck into the wanting to scan scene and I keep doing it and it won't do anything will return tomorrow if nothing changes

developer_response.body:
Hi Bella Paw, 
Can you please double check to be sure that spatial data permissions are enabled. Go to Settings --> Privacy and Safety --> App Permissions and enable Spatial Data on Dino Hab. Another solution could be trying to clear any previous room scans in the headset settings, to create a new scan. Go to Settings --> Environment Setup --> Space setup. If this doesn't help, please reach out to the team at support@darkslope.com. They will be on the lookout for your note in case you reach out.

reviews.review_description: So many cute baby dinosaurs! If you got the Jurassic World game it’s 1 million times better’ You have to get this game

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We’re so glad you’re loving it—those baby dinosaurs do steal hearts! Keep enjoying your time in Dino Hab 💚

reviews.review_title: Great game but lacks easy support
reviews.review_description:
Updated my review from 2 stars to 3.
The developer's response to my stated problem in the original review was exactly what I needed.  My son is now happily playing with 4 dinos.  Game seems to be fun and exactly as advertised.  The problem is that it lacks an easy way to contact anyone for help with issues or questions.
My private message on their Facebook page was never answered and their website has no email/contact information.  There is no wiki page, forums or other avenues of help so if you run into a problem, you may be truly stuck.  Excited about the game but afraid of the next problem.
* original review* Pre-ordered.  My son wanted this from the moment it hit pre-order and paid his own birthday money for it.  Unfortunately, he didn't realize it was pre-order and was very sad when he couldn't play it.  But he checked on it almost every day till it popped up as playable.  Unfortunately, because it's brand new, there's not a lot of help available when you get stuck like he did.  Unfortunately, the room setup is not explained at all and won't let you start the game until it's complete.  Since it won't explain why the setup isn't sufficient, he's stuck in the room setup screen, unable to play this game he was so excited about.
Lesson learned - Never pre-order a game.  Let actual players figure out what's wrong and how to fix it, then buy it.

developer_response.body:
Hi,

We want to help to make sure that your son can meet his own dinosaurs and help to save their habitats! Thank you for this feedback. We've passed it along to the team. Please double check to be sure that spatial data permissions are enabled. Go to Settings --> Privacy and Safety --> App Permissions and enable Spatial Data on Dino Hab. Another solution could be trying to clear any previous room scans in the headset settings, to create a new scan. Go to Settings --> Environment Setup --> Space setup. If this doesn't help, please reach out to the team at support@darkslope.com They will be on the lookout for your note in case you reach out.

reviews.review_description: Love the game quality of Dino Hab, it’s my favorite Dinosaur game in VR, it’s like working w/ Dr. Henry Woo from Jurassic Park as one of the scientists and I love it so much that I highly recommend people who loves Jurassic Park/ Jurassic World to experience themselves.

developer_response.body: Hi skywalker94.2023, thanks for sharing your experience with us! We love to hear that you’re enjoying your time raising your dinosaurs in prehistoric habitats.

reviews.review_description:
I was playing the first level and I got all of my dinosaurs to adult but the objective to grow my buddy to adult didn't complete blocking me from the rest of the game 

Update after sometime of playing and messing around the task was complete letting me continue

developer_response.body: Hi gojira_lover, thank you for sharing your feedback! We’re glad you could continue progressing after some time. Keep nurturing those dinos and restoring harmony <3

reviews.review_description:
PROS, the graphics are amazing, and it is great to have baby dinosaurs in your living room.
CONS,I couldn't go anywhere from the triceratops with which you start and so you are constantly trying to maintain plants while having an annoying voice telling me to constantly press Y to read the stuff I hadn't. All in all looks great but you can become bored rather quickly

developer_response.body: Hi Dark_ang31, thank you for your review. We’re glad you enjoyed the graphics and having baby dinos in your living room. We’ll make sure to share your feedback about Puck and pacing with the team.

reviews.review_description:
I got this for my grandson who is autistic and loves dinosaurs. 

Currently his quest 2 will not play the game as it gets stuck on some quest border screen and I can’t get past it to play. 

I am able to play on quest 3 but I it should work on quest 2 so please fix this issue. 

When playing i noticed far to
Much time is spent planting and petting and planting. Hardly no time to enjoy the dinosaur really. Think there needs some more time a plant can feed. One Dino ate the entire huge tree which was a bit much. 

The 4th Dino egg when hatched took 7 times for food to grow? Grand son got boarded of doing the same thing over and over just to see the same dinosaur in a different color. 

Game has potential so I do hope developers look into these issues and take into consideration kids attention spans

developer_response.body: Hi fitzxp, thank you for your feedback. Dino Hab is compatible for Meta Quest 3, Meta Quest 3S, Meta Quest 2 and Meta Quest Pro. Please reach out to support@darkslope.com so our team can help you.

reviews.review_description: The positive first… I absolutely LOVE the graphics, scale when they’re grown and scenery. What I am not crazy about is the never ending “GPS” lady , constantly reminding me to press “Y” and read the Dino facts I haven’t read. I got stuck in the mountain style rock and couldn’t get out, had to delete that game run and start from scratch. It said the only task I have left is to grow my buddy to an adult, which has been the case for days! I’m still not able to advance to get the second group of Dino’s. As a result, once my entire eco system has been perfectly balanced, trees start dying in clusters, and then the GPS constant reminder to plant trees in clusters , won’t stop! It’s like a tutorial that never ends! We know how to plant trees and when, it’s just that they never stop dying no matter how much ding and mushrooms are around them. Then the Dino’s start dying in weather events or just because the game has to be on repeat over and over until it says my Dino has grown up, but he did that a long time ago. There’s never enough dung to keep the trees that are fully grown, alive so, they once again die 😂. HELP!! I love the game but it needs to be modified or fixed. Thanks so much in advance . ☺️

developer_response.body: Hi MelissaD100, thank you for sharing your experience—we’re thrilled to hear you’re loving the graphics and immersive scenery! Have you checked the portal to see if the next area is unlocked? Feel free to reach out to support@darkslope.com if you’d like some help.
